# Stylianos (Stelios) Gisdakis

> Head of AI at Filed. A decade of leadership in data, ML, and platform
> engineering across fintech — Visa, Tink, Anyfin, Spotify, Klarna.
> PhD in Electrical Engineering from KTH Royal Institute of Technology.
> Based in Stockholm, Sweden.

## Current

- **Head of AI, Filed** (Aug 2025 – present). Stockholm. Building and
  leading the AI organisation: ML platform, research direction, and
  shipping models into the workflows of finance teams.

## Previous roles

- **Senior Director, Core Platform — Visa** (Oct 2024 – Nov 2025).
  Led core platform engineering across Visa Global Open Banking. Owned
  the multi-region systems that banks and fintechs across Europe plug
  into — reliability, scaling, developer platform, engineering leadership.
- **Director, Data & Analytics — Tink** (Jan 2023 – Oct 2024).
  Ran data and analytics for the open-banking product through Tink's
  acquisition by Visa.
- **Head of Data Science — Anyfin** (Oct 2018 – Jan 2023). First data
  hire. Built the team that owned credit risk and pricing as the
  company grew.
- **Senior Data Scientist — Spotify** (Nov 2017 – Oct 2018).
  Personalisation and experimentation on the consumer product.
- **Data Scientist · Team Lead — Klarna** (Jan 2016 – Nov 2017). ML
  models for credit risk and fraud on the consumer credit product.

## Education

- **PhD, Electrical Engineering — KTH Royal Institute of Technology**
  (2012 – 2016). Networked systems security: machine-learning approaches
  to intrusion and fraud detection, identity and credential management
  for vehicular and mobile systems.
- **MSc, Information & Communication Systems Security — KTH** (2009 – 2011).
- **Diploma, Computer Science — Athens University of Economics and
  Business** (2004 – 2008).

## Background

- Nationality: Greek. Resident in Sweden since 2009.
- Languages: Greek (native), English (full professional), Swedish
  (working), French (working).

## Contact

- Email: gisdakis.s@gmail.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/gisdakis
- Site: https://gisdakis.github.io/
